title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 82.680 - Other compensation abolished
text:
82.680.  Other compensation abolished. — All fees, commissions or other compensation heretofore charged, received or allowed by or to any such collector, as compensation for his services, either under or by virtue of state law, the charter of such city, or otherwise, are hereby abolished.
(L. 1945 p. 1311 § 9)
